scripts.jupyter:clean: uv run python -c "import shutil, os; [shutil.rmtree(p) if os.path.isdir(p) else os.remove(p) if os.path.exists(p) else None for p in ['./.jupyterlite.doit.db', './.vitepress/dist/jupyter']]"
scripts.prejupyter:build: uv run python -c "import shutil, os; [shutil.rmtree(p) if os.path.isdir(p) else os.remove(p) if os.path.exists(p) else None for p in ['./.jupyterlite.doit.db', './.vitepress/dist/jupyter']]"
